title: Presence Footsteps (NeoForge)
description: An Overly complicated Sound Mod,and unofficial port of Presence Footsteps (Forge) from Forge to NeoForge
body:
**Overview**

An unofficial port of Presence Footsteps (Forge) from Forge to NeoForge. For Forge, check out the original mod.

This mod adds new, more dynamic sounds to every block the player steps on, triggering an audio effect with each movement. It also allows you to create your own custom sounds.

---

If you have any problems with this NeoForge version of the mod, please file an issue [here](https://github.com/ZCRAFT-NPE/Presence-Footsteps-NeoForge/issues) - don't pester Sollace on the original Fabric/Forge version of the mod for issues you're having with this NeoForge version.

---

The author of the original mod is Sollace/PaintNinja.

Links to the author:

[Sollace](https://modrinth.com/user/sollace)

[Paintninja](https://modrinth.com/user/paintninja)

Link to the original mod:

[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)

---

**Contributing**

Contributions are welcome! If you have ideas for improvements or new features, feel free to submit a pull request.

If you find this project helpful, please consider starring the repository. Your support is greatly appreciated!

---

Now on the previously unsupported Neoforge.
